LanguageData.WulaEnergyMaxLevelOffset.label: Mechanical Wula max energy
LanguageData.WulaEnergyMaxLevelOffset.description: Offset to a mechanical Wula's maximum energy.
LanguageData.WulaEnergyFallRateFactor.label: Mechanical Wula energy consumption rate
LanguageData.WulaEnergyFallRateFactor.description: Multiplier for how quickly a mechanical Wula consumes energy.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceCriticalFailureThreshold: Multiplier affecting the threshold for a Wula Empire synth to enter critical failure. Higher values make critical failure more likely.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceDamageToMaintenanceFacto: How much maintenance a Wula Empire synth loses from damage. Higher values mean more maintenance is lost when taking damage.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceDegradationFactor.label: Maintenance decay multiplier
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceDegradationFactor.descri: Multiplier for how quickly a Wula Empire synth's maintenance need decays. Higher values make low-maintenance states more likely.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceMajorBreakdownThresholdF: Multiplier affecting the threshold for a Wula Empire synth to enter major breakdown. Higher values make major breakdown more likely.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceMinorBreakdownThresholdF: Multiplier affecting the threshold for a Wula Empire synth to enter minor breakdown. Higher values make minor breakdown more likely.
LanguageData.WULA_MaintenanceStatusThresholdFactor.de: Multiplier affecting the thresholds for maintenance statuses. Higher values make low-maintenance debuff states easier to reach.
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCooldownAfterDamage.label: Nano-repair cooldown (after damage)
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCooldownAfterDamage.descr: Time (in ticks) before the nano-repair system can activate after taking damage.
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCostPerHP.label: Nano-repair energy cost
LanguageData.WULA_NanoRepairCostPerHP.description: Energy consumed by the nano-repair system per 1 HP restored.
